description: The luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style.UpperLeather straps over the forefoot, midfoot and back heel to lock the foot in placeConnecting strap between forefoot and midfoot strapVelcro closure for all strapsto offer a customised FitNubuck footbedCurved toward the heel for protection of the footRemovable strap at the back heel so as to wear as a sandal and not a floaterOutsoleTPR outsole with terraced grooves and a curved midfootSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
